sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Amcor plc stock faces sustainability pressures amid 2026 plastic packaging market shifts
feed.summary: Amcor plc is navigating increasing sustainability pressures and market shifts in the plastic packaging industry, particularly concerning recyclable closures and PCR materials, with significant growth projected through 2036. The company is actively investing in sustainable production, expanding its North American operations, and focusing on innovation to maintain its competitive edge against rivals like Berry Global and Silgan. US investors are closely watching Amcor's strategic moves, including expansion of closure production in Poland and investment in PCR laminates, as regulatory compliance and material innovation become key differentiators.

feed.title: S&P Global Inc. stock in focus as Mobility Global sets Investor Day ahead of mid-2026 separation
feed.summary: S&P Global Inc. announced that its Mobility division, rebranded as Mobility Global, will host an Investor Day on May 12, 2026, marking a significant step towards its spin-off into a standalone public company by mid-2026. This strategic move aims to sharpen S&P Global's focus on its core intelligence segments while unlocking value for shareholders. The company reported record financials in 2025, bolstering confidence in its post-separation business model which will center on Ratings, Market Intelligence, Commodity Insights, and Dow Jones Indices.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. stock gains momentum on Superstate tokenization partnership for USTB fund
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. has announced a strategic partnership with Superstate to manage the tokenized USTB short-duration US treasuries fund, signaling a significant move into digital assets and tokenization. This collaboration positions Invesco as a key player in bridging traditional finance with blockchain technology, making it the first major asset manager to leverage Superstate's onchain infrastructure. The partnership aims to enhance efficiency and access for institutional investors, with the transition expected in Q2 2026 and the fund being renamed "Invesco Short Duration US Government Securities Fund."

feed.title: General Dynamics unit wins $95 million Navy submarine contract By Investing.com
feed.summary: General Dynamics Electric Boat Corp. secured a $95 million contract modification from the U.S. Department of War for submarine support services. The Groton, Connecticut-based unit will provide engineering, technical, design agent, and planning yard support for operational strategic and attack submarines. The project is scheduled for completion by June 2026, with Navy funds already obligated for the award.

feed.title: EnerSys to Participate in Jefferies Fireside Chat
feed.summary: EnerSys (NYSE: ENS) announced that its President and CEO, Shawn O’Connell, and Executive Vice President and CFO, Andrea Funk, will participate in a fireside chat hosted by Jefferies on Thursday, March 26th, at 2:00 pm ET. A live webcast and archived replay of the event will be available to the public on the company's investor relations website. EnerSys is a global leader in stored energy solutions for industrial applications, providing energy systems, motive power, specialty batteries, and new ventures solutions worldwide.

feed.title: Huntsman Corp. Opens Weak with Gap Down Amid Market Concerns
feed.summary: Huntsman Corp., a small-cap chemicals company, opened with a significant 5.73% decline, part of a broader 14.74% drop over the past day and a 22.37% fall over the last month. The company, with a market capitalization of USD 2.55 billion, is currently operating at a loss, as indicated by its negative return on equity and mixed technical indicators. Despite a high dividend yield, its financial performance and stock market trend suggest bearish sentiment.

feed.title: Coincheck Group (CNCK) director discloses ordinary shares and 26,490 RSUs
feed.summary: Coincheck Group N.V. director Tan Sin Yin has reported initial beneficial ownership in the company through a Form 3 SEC filing. The director holds 17,516 ordinary shares directly and 26,490 restricted share units (RSUs), which represent a contingent right to receive ordinary shares or cash. These RSUs are scheduled to vest in full on the date of the 2026 annual general meeting of shareholders.

feed.title: A Look At StepStone Group (STEP) Valuation After New Buyback Plan And Senior Leadership Appointments
feed.summary: StepStone Group (STEP) has announced a new share repurchase plan of up to US$100 million and several senior leadership promotions. Despite a recent share price decline over 90 days, longer-term investors have seen better returns. The article analyzes STEP's valuation, noting its Price-to-Sales multiple of 2.1x appears overvalued compared to a regression-based fair value estimate of 0.8x, despite screening cheaper than industry peers.

feed.title: Bicara Therapeutics (BCAX) CFO exercises options and sells 9,200 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Bicara Therapeutics Inc.'s Chief Financial Officer, Hyep Ivan, exercised stock options for 9,200 shares and subsequently sold all 9,200 shares on March 23, 2026. This transaction was part of a pre-planned Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on February 13, 2025. Following these actions, Ivan directly owns 145,355 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies Inc. stock rises on advanced chromatography solutions launch boosting lab effic
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies Inc. has launched new chromatography solutions aimed at enhancing lab efficiency in pharmaceutical and biotech research, integrating AI-driven data processing for faster analysis. This innovation positions Agilent for growth in high-margin R&D markets, attracting investor interest with its stock trading around 111 USD on the NYSE. The company's strategic focus on critical needs like trace impurity detection and strong positioning in the expanding life sciences sector contribute to its optimistic outlook.

feed.title: Entergy Corp. stock faces scrutiny amid rising utility sector demands and regulatory shifts in 2026
feed.summary: Entergy Corp. is facing increased scrutiny as it navigates rising electricity demands from data centers and electrification trends, requiring significant infrastructure investments. The company plans to spend $30-35 billion on capital expenditures over the next five years and accelerate its clean energy portfolio, targeting 10 GW of solar and battery storage by 2030. Despite operating in high-growth southern markets and offering stable dividends, investors will need to monitor regulatory approvals, potential rate hikes, and execution risks related to its energy transition strategy.

feed.title: Altria Group Inc. stock faces valuation scrutiny amid smoke-free push and recent NYSE decline
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. is under valuation scrutiny as it pushes its smoke-free strategy with the nationwide rollout of on! PLUS nicotine pouches, despite a recent 0.11% dip in its NYSE shares on March 24, 2026, extending an eight-day losing streak. The company aims to transition adult smokers to non-combustible alternatives, leveraging its long-standing dividend track record while facing challenges from declining cigarette sales and competitive oral nicotine markets. Analysts' price targets range from $50 to $74, reflecting mixed sentiment amidst the company's strategic shift and potential risks associated with regulatory scrutiny and high payout ratios.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Inc. stock faces pressure from Q4 2025 subscriber slowdown and maturing 5G market
feed.summary: T-Mobile US Inc. stock experienced a 2.1% dip in pre-market trading after its Q4 2025 earnings revealed a slowdown in postpaid phone net additions, signaling market maturation. The company reported 903,000 net adds, down from 928,000 a year prior, leading to moderated 2026 guidance focusing on disciplined execution rather than hyper-growth. Despite strong service revenues and free cash flow, increased competition and rising churn rates are pressing T-Mobile to balance network investments with shareholder returns.

feed.title: Welltower Inc. stock faces renewed investor scrutiny amid senior housing demand surge and interest r
feed.summary: Welltower Inc., a leading REIT in senior housing, is gaining investor attention due to increased demand from an aging population and stabilizing interest rates. The company reported strong occupancy rates and strategic acquisitions in high-growth US markets, positioning it favorably for income-focused portfolios. Investors are also noting its defensive qualities, strong dividend yield, and proactive debt management amid evolving market dynamics.

feed.title: Aptiv plc stock faces uncertainty amid sector headwinds and leadership mentions in peer filings
feed.summary: Aptiv plc is navigating challenges from an EV demand slowdown and potential tariff risks, despite its crucial role in automotive technology. Recent proxy filings from other companies highlight Aptiv's board-level connections, indicating diversified expertise. The company's future hinges on its ability to pivot towards software and connectivity services to offset hardware cyclicality and address competitive pressures.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) Is Up 5.9% After Selling OxyChem To Refocus On Core Energy Operations
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum has sold its OxyChem business for approximately US$9.70 billion, using the proceeds for debt reduction and to concentrate on its core oil and gas operations. This move is part of a strategic rebalancing, with planned capital investment of US$5.50 billion to US$5.90 billion in 2026, aiming to strengthen its focus on high-priority energy assets. The divestment is set to reshape Occidental Petroleum’s investment profile, though its exposure to oil price volatility remains a key factor.

feed.title: Top Stock Reports for Amazon.com, TJX and Eaton Corp.
feed.summary: Zacks Investment Research has released new reports on 16 major stocks, highlighting Amazon.com, TJX Companies, and Eaton Corp. Key insights include Amazon's outperformance driven by diversification and AI, TJX's success with its off-price model despite rising costs, and Eaton's growth fueled by AI data centers and strategic acquisitions. The reports also cover micro-cap stocks Blue Ridge Bankshares and Security Federal Corp., along with other prominent companies like Goldman Sachs and Medtronic.

feed.title: Prologis Inc. stock faces headwinds from softening logistics demand amid industrial REIT challenges
feed.summary: Prologis Inc., the world's largest industrial REIT, is facing challenges from weakening demand for logistics properties, impacting occupancy rates and rental growth. This softening market, influenced by e-commerce slowdowns and overbuilding in key U.S. markets, is putting pressure on Prologis stock, though its strong balance sheet and consistent dividend appeal to income-focused investors. The situation highlights the vulnerability of industrial properties to economic cycles and global trade shifts, making it a critical watch for investors.

feed.title: Battalion Oil Stock Falls As Trump's Iran Pause Sends Crude Prices Tumbling
feed.summary: Battalion Oil (NYSE: BATL) shares fell sharply after crude prices tumbled due to President Trump's announcement of a five-day pause on strikes against Iranian energy infrastructure following productive talks with Tehran. This geopolitical de-escalation sent West Texas Intermediate crude down over 8% and Brent down around 8%. The decline in oil prices negatively impacts independent oil and natural gas producers like Battalion Oil, whose stock is highly sensitive to commodity price movements.

feed.title: PriceSmart Faces Weak Start with 5.05% Gap Down Amid Market Concerns
feed.summary: PriceSmart, Inc. experienced a 5.05% gap down, reflecting a weak start and a broader market trend. The company's stock has lagged behind the S&P 500 over the past month, with a 7.5% decrease compared to the S&P 500's 5.83% decline. Technical indicators show mixed signals, with a mildly bearish weekly MACD but a bullish monthly MACD, while the company holds a market capitalization of USD 4.77 billion.

feed.title: Nektar Therapeutics (NKTR) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announced that shareholders of Nektar Therapeutics (NKTR) who incurred losses have the opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Nektar failed to disclose issues with patient enrollment in its REZOLVE-AA trial, which negatively impacted trial results and overstated the trial's integrity. Investors who suffered losses between February 26, 2025, and December 15, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm before the May 5, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline.

feed.title: PSA: T-Mobile customers have a week to sign up for a free year of MLB.TV
feed.summary: T-Mobile is once again offering its customers a free one-year subscription to MLB.TV for the 2026 baseball season. This popular perk, valued at $150, allows streaming of regular season games and other MLB content. Customers need to redeem the offer through the T Life app before March 31st at 4:59 AM ET.

feed.title: Equity Residential stock faces renewed pressure amid rising interest rates and urban apartment market shifts
feed.summary: Equity Residential (EQR) stock is facing renewed pressure due to elevated financing costs and softening occupancy in key urban markets. The article highlights refinancing risks from high interest rates and moderated rent growth in core coastal markets, while noting the company's strong balance sheet and strategic capital allocation. Despite headwinds, EQR's focus on prime urban assets, demographic tailwinds, and a sustainable dividend yield make it an attractive defensive play for US investors seeking real estate exposure.

feed.title: Equity Residential stock faces renewed pressure amid rising interest rates and urban apartment market shifts
feed.summary: Equity Residential (EQR) stock is under pressure due to high interest rates, increased financing costs, and softening occupancy in key urban markets. As a major apartment REIT, EQR is navigating refinancing risks and potential rent growth slowdowns, with investors closely watching its balance sheet management and portfolio resilience. The company's urban market focus aims to leverage demographic tailwinds, but rising operating expenses and moderated rent growth present challenges.

feed.title: Tigress Financial Lifts Price Target on The Boeing Company (BA) to $290, Reiterates Buy
feed.summary: Tigress Financial has raised its price target for The Boeing Company (BA) to $290 from $275, maintaining a "Buy" rating due to increasing commercial air traffic, a record backlog of orders across commercial aerospace, defense, and space, and strong aftermarket offerings. This comes after the company's fourth-quarter results suggested an inflection in scale, earnings, cash flow, and demand visibility. Jefferies also maintained a "Buy" rating with a $295 price target, and Boeing is currently a "Strong Buy" with an average one-year share price target of $278.50, representing a 43% upside potential.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Company stock rises on Baupost Group stake increase amid 2026 guidance scrutiny
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Company (GPC) stock rose after Baupost Group increased its stake in Q4 2025, despite the company reporting weak Q4 results and a lower-than-expected FY 2026 EPS guidance. This institutional buying signals confidence in the automotive aftermarket leader, with analysts noting its dual focus on auto and industrial parts and attractive dividend yield for US investors. The move suggests a contrarian bet on GPC's long-term value and market position amidst sector challenges and a competitive landscape.

feed.title: Origin Materials Q4 2025 Earnings Preview: Recent $ORGN Insider Trading, Hedge Fund Activity, and More
feed.summary: Origin Materials (ORGN) is expected to release its Q4 2025 earnings on March 27th, with analysts projecting $29.68 million in revenue and an -$0.08 EPS. Recent insider trading shows 8 sales and no purchases over the last six months, totaling $135,637 in sales. Hedge fund activity in Q4 2025 indicates a mixed sentiment, with 31 institutional investors increasing positions and 41 decreasing them.

feed.title: Applied Materials Inc. stock faces pressure amid maturing chip cycle and mixed Q1 FY2026 results
feed.summary: Applied Materials Inc. stock is experiencing pressure due to a maturing chip cycle and mixed Q1 FY2026 results. Despite beating profit expectations, the company reported a revenue decline, reflecting investor caution. US investors are closely watching the balance between strong AI demand from hyperscalers and inventory normalization in traditional semiconductor segments, with the CHIPS Act providing a tailwind for domestic operations.

feed.title: 4 Pack 564XL Black/Color Ink Cartridge For HP 564XL PhotoSmart 7510 7520 7525
feed.summary: This article describes a 4-pack of 564XL black/color ink cartridges designed for HP PhotoSmart 7510, 7520, and 7525 printers.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Lowers Bank of America (BAC) Price Target to $57
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has lowered its price target for Bank of America (BAC) to $57 from $67, while maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment comes as new proposals from US regulators concerning Basel III Endgame are expected to positively impact large-cap banks by potentially reducing capital requirements. Separately, Bank of America recently settled a civil lawsuit related to Jeffrey Epstein, with the bank denying deeper involvement while affirming its focus on standard banking services.

feed.title: JPMorgan Financial (AMJB) sells $5M 4.85% callable notes due 2031
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has priced a $5 million offering of Callable Fixed Rate Notes due March 24, 2031, with an interest rate of 4.85% per annum. The notes are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. The issuer has the option to redeem the notes in whole, but not in part, on specified dates between March 2027 and September 2030.

feed.title: Mosaic Company stock faces pressure amid fertilizer market challenges and production hurdles as of M
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE: MOS) is experiencing pressure due to weak demand in Brazil, high sulfur costs, and operational setbacks, leading to a recent stock decline. Analysts have issued "Hold" ratings and revised earnings downward, yet the company maintains a dividend yield of around 3.54% and an investment-grade credit profile. US investors are monitoring Mosaic's ability to navigate these challenges given its critical role in global food supply.

feed.title: Dominion Energy rate increase could raise SC power bills as families struggle to keep up
feed.summary: Dominion Energy South Carolina is seeking state regulatory approval for an 11% electric rate increase, which could raise average customer bills by $20 per month. This proposal comes less than a year after a previous rate hike, prompting concerns from residents like Krystal Spahr, a mother of six, who struggles to afford her current power bills. The Public Service Commission will review the request and hold public hearings before making a final decision.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Prosperity Bancshares (NYSE:PB) Director Sells 600 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Prosperity Bancshares (NYSE:PB) Director Ned Holmes sold 600 shares of the company's stock on March 25th for $39,744, reducing his stake by 1.43%. The sale leaves him with 41,300 shares valued at approximately $2.73 million. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.60 per share, and analysts have mixed ratings on the stock with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $78.92.

feed.title: Welltower-Amica deal gets regulatory clearance
feed.summary: Welltower Inc. has received regulatory clearance from the Competition Bureau of Canada to acquire the Amica Senior Lifestyles portfolio for $4.6-billion. The approval is conditional on Welltower selling four existing properties in Canada, a move reflecting the Bureau's efforts to ensure market competition. This development clears the way for Welltower to take ownership of the high-end Amica portfolio, which includes 31 luxury retirement homes, projects under construction, and development sites.
feed.source: REMI Network - Real Estate Management Industry Network
feed.source_domain: REMI Network - Real Estate Management Industry Network

feed.title: W.W. Grainger (NYSE:GWW) CFO Deidra Merriwether Sells 2,339 Shares
feed.summary: W.W. Grainger CFO Deidra Merriwether sold 2,339 shares of the company's stock on March 24th for approximately $2.49 million, reducing her stake by 18.6%. This sale leaves her with 10,235 shares valued at $10.89 million, as disclosed in an SEC filing. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $2.26 per share and reported $9.45 EPS for the quarter, slightly missing consensus estimates.

feed.title: [Form 3] ABBOTT LABORATORIES Initial Statement of Beneficial Ownership
feed.summary: Orville Jacob A, Senior Vice President at ABBOTT LABORATORIES (ABT), has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership (Form 3) reporting 37,238 common shares. These shares are part of a restricted stock unit award with a four-year vesting schedule, commencing on February 25, 2027, and allow for shares to be withheld for tax purposes. This filing is related to Abbott's acquisition of Exact Sciences Corporation, in which Exact shares were converted to cash and certain Exact RSUs were assumed and converted into Abbott RSUs.

feed.title: Equifax Inc. stock faces ETF spotlight amid financial sector rotation pressures
feed.summary: Equifax Inc. (EFX) is drawing attention from US investors as a holding in the Baron Financials ETF (BCFN), underscoring its role in credit information services amidst economic uncertainty and interest rate dynamics. Despite broader sector headwinds, Equifax's inclusion in BCFN, with a 1.00% allocation, signals investor interest in financial data providers and highlights its potential as a growth play on consumer credit health and lending activity in a high-rate environment. The article also discusses risks such as cybersecurity breaches and regulatory pressures, as well as opportunities for investors betting on increased credit inquiry volumes.

feed.title: Cencora Inc. stock faces uncertainty amid Medicaid managed care pressures and management shifts
feed.summary: Cencora Inc., formerly AmerisourceBergen, is grappling with uncertainties stemming from Medicaid managed care pressures and potential management changes. Despite steady revenue growth driven by specialty pharmaceuticals, softening demand signals from government payers and policy shifts affecting drug pricing are impacting the pharmaceutical distributor. Investors are closely monitoring Cencora's operational resilience, supply chain efficiency, and its ability to navigate regulatory challenges as it plays a critical role in the US drug supply chain.

feed.title: HP Inc. unveils HP IQ to streamline workplace connectivity with AI at HPImagine
feed.summary: HP Inc. has launched HP IQ, an AI intelligence layer designed to automate background tasks and integrate office environments, revealed at its HPImagine event. This platform aims to enhance workplace efficiency and collaboration by connecting people, spaces, and ideas through AI. The announcement aligns with HP's ongoing commitment to integrating advanced technology into business operations and follows recent partnerships emphasising innovation and teamwork, such as with Ferrari.

feed.title: Finnair orders up to 46 Embraer aircraft
feed.summary: Finnair has signed an agreement with Embraer for up to 46 E195-E2 aircraft, including 18 firm orders. These new aircraft will replace older models, supporting Finnair's profitable growth strategy and climate targets due to their superior efficiency and fuel savings. Deliveries are expected to begin in the second half of 2027.

feed.title: Values Meets Returns: 3 New Faith-Based ETFs Targeting Income And Growth Hit The Market
feed.summary: Faith Investor Services (FIS) has launched three new faith-based ETFs: FIS Bright Portfolios Core Bond ETF (BRIB), FIS Faith Income ETF (FTHB), and FIS Tactical Equity ETF (ACTS). These new funds expand FIS's offerings into fixed income and equity strategies, all aligned with Christian values, aiming to provide competitive returns without compromising faith-based principles. This launch addresses the increasing demand for ethical and faith-aligned investments, positioning these ETFs as core portfolio components for investors seeking both performance and purpose.

feed.title: TriNet Group (NYSE: TNET) CFO receives 46,260-share RSU grant
feed.summary: TriNet Group's EVP and CFO, Mala Murthy, has been granted 46,260 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of her equity compensation. These RSUs will vest quarterly over a four-year period, aligning executive incentives with long-term shareholder value. Following this grant, Murthy's total beneficial ownership in TriNet Group stands at 122,788 shares, excluding any unvested performance-based units.

feed.title: Applied Materials Korea Signs MOU to Support River and Ecosystem Protection
feed.summary: Applied Materials Korea has signed an MOU with the Korea Environmental Action Association to continue its "Our River Guardians" initiative for the sixth consecutive year. The program aims to improve water quality and protect river ecosystems through activities such as deploying EM mud balls and removing invasive species. This year, the initiative will expand to more waterways and involve greater public participation, including collaborations with schools and non-face-to-face programs.
feed.source: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media
feed.source_domain: THE ELEC, Korea Electronics Industry Media

feed.title: Top 3 Industrials Stocks That Are Set To Fly In Q1
feed.summary: This article identifies three industrial stocks—Herc Holdings Inc (HRI), HNI Corp (HNI), and Interface Inc (TILE)—as oversold, presenting potential buying opportunities for investors. Despite recent price drops of 18-28% for these companies, their Relative Strength Index (RSI) values are near or below 30, traditionally indicating an oversold condition. Analyst ratings and company statements suggest underlying strength and future growth potential for these stocks.

feed.title: Turtle Beach (TBCH) director sells 20,000 shares in open market
feed.summary: Turtle Beach Corp director Katherine Lee Scherping sold 20,000 shares of common stock in open-market transactions on March 20 and March 23, 2026, for prices between $11.50 and $11.62 per share. Following these sales, Scherping directly owns 14,465 shares of TBCH. The transactions were reported in a Form 4 filing, indicating moderate impact and negative sentiment for the company.

feed.title: Why Is Oracle Trading Higher Monday?
feed.summary: Oracle (ORCL) shares traded higher on Monday due to improving geopolitical sentiment and broader market momentum, with tech stocks rallying. The rally was attributed to positive talks between the U.S. and Iran and news of a deal to transfer TikTok's U.S. operations, involving Oracle. Despite a near-term bounce, technical analysis indicates a longer-term downtrend, while analyst outlooks remain generally positive.

feed.title: Assessing ADMA Biologics (ADMA) Valuation After Fresh Analyst Upgrades And Strong Buy Sentiment
feed.summary: Analyst sentiment for ADMA Biologics (ADMA) has improved, leading to a consensus Strong Buy rating despite recent share price declines. The stock appears undervalued based on an estimated intrinsic value and analyst price targets, with one narrative suggesting a fair value of $20.93. However, a contrasting view based on market ratios indicates a richer price, with its P/E ratio exceeding industry averages, suggesting expectations are already priced in.

feed.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Pembina Pipeline Declares Quarterly Preferred Share Dividends and Announces Business Update and First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Calls
feed.summary: Pembina Pipeline Corporation has issued a corrected statement regarding its preferred share dividends, amending the shareholders of record date for Series 25 preferred share dividends to April 30, 2026. The company also announced webcasts for a general business update on April 7, 2026, and for its first quarter 2026 results on May 8, 2026. These updates provide crucial information for investors and stakeholders on dividend payments and upcoming financial disclosures.

feed.title: Texas Capital Launches Government Money Market Exchange Traded Fund
feed.summary: Texas Capital Bank Private Wealth Advisors and Texas Capital Funds Trust have introduced the Texas Capital Government Money Market ETF (MMKT), an innovative fund that combines the liquidity of an ETF with the characteristics of a money market fund. This ETF, adhering to Rule 2a-7, aims to offer high current interest income while maintaining principal stability through investments in short-term U.S. government debt. It expands Texas Capital's fund offerings, managed by J. Steven Orr, and focuses on managing credit risk and preserving capital for investors.
